formulas.name: 1. Probability of an Event
formulas.formula: P(E) = (Number of outcomes favourable to E) / (Total number of outcomes)

formulas.name: 2. Probability of 'not E'
formulas.variables: P(E') = Probability of event 'not E', P(E) = Probability of event E

formulas.name: 3. Addition Theorem for 2 Events
formulas.formula: P(A ∪ B) = P(A) + P(B) - P(A ∩ B)
formulas.variables: P(A ∪ B) = Probability of A or B, P(A) = Probability of A, P(B) = Probability of B, P(A ∩ B) = Probability of A and B
formulas.notes: For any two events A and B

formulas.name: 4. Multiplication Theorem for 2 Independent Events
formulas.variables: P(A ∩ B) = Probability of A and B, P(A) = Probability of A, P(B) = Probability of B
formulas.notes: For independent events A and B

formulas.name: 5. Conditional Probability
formulas.variables: P(A|B) = Probability of A given B, P(A ∩ B) = Probability of A and B, P(B) = Probability of B
formulas.notes: For events A and B where P(B) ≠ 0

formulas.name: 6. Bayes' Theorem
formulas.variables: P(A|B) = Probability of A given B, P(B|A) = Probability of B given A, P(A) = Probability of A, P(B) = Probability of B
formulas.notes: For events A and B where P(B) ≠ 0

formulas.name: 7. Probability of 'at least'
formulas.variables: P(at least n) = Probability of at least n, P(x < n) = Probability of less than n

formulas.name: 8. Mean of a Probability Distribution
formulas.variables: μ = Mean, x = Value of random variable, P(x) = Probability of x

formulas.name: 9. Variance of a Probability Distribution
formulas.variables: σ² = Variance, x = Value of random variable, μ = Mean, P(x) = Probability of x

formulas.name: 10. Standard Deviation of a Probability Distribution
